home.commitmentDesc: We provide exceptional travel services, personalized support and innovative solutions. Our team is dedicated to making every journey seamless and memorable, combining industry expertise with genuine care for our clients' experience.
home.ctaDesc: Our experts are ready to guide you with personalized solutions and professional support tailored just for you.

footer.brandDesc: Your trusted partner for corporate and luxury travel. Delivering excellence in every journey since 2005.

about.description: Incorporated in 1995 under the leadership of Asia Khan Travels has evolved over the years leading the travel industry due to its best ethical practices and unrivaled knowledge and is now recognized as a premium and luxury travel agency. Their expert team crafts tailor-made itineraries, meticulously curating every aspect of the journey to exceed expectations. With the commitment to deliver excellence, it has come a long way by earning best travel agent award initially in 2000, followed every year till date. With such diligence and integrity, it has gained worldwide exposure offering best tours and packages.

0.title: Our Mission
0.desc: Our mission is to enrich lives through transformative travel experiences. We strive to exceed customer expectations by providing personalised and innovative travel solutions based on our years of rich experience in travel industry.

1.title: Vision
1.desc: Our vision is to be the leading provider of extraordinary travel experiences. By fostering lasting partnerships, embracing innovation and staying ahead of industry trends, we aspire to shape the future of travel and be the first choice of travellers seeking unforgettable adventures around the globe.

2.title: Core Values
2.desc: Credibility : We build trust with our customers by delivering on our promises, and providing reliable information and services to build a long term relationship. Innovation : We embrace innovation & stay up to date with the latest trends and technologies in the travel industry to continuously enhance our services and provide innovative travel solutions

ceo.title: Message from Our CEO
ceo.message: At Asia Khan Travels, we believe that travel is not just about reaching a destination, but about the journey of transformation. Since 1995, we have been committed to crafting experiences that go beyond expectations, building trust through every interaction, and setting new standards in luxury travel. Our success is measured by the smiles of our clients and the memories we create together.
ceo.name: Asia Khan, CEO
